Test if an Object is an fr_col

Source: R/classes.R
is.fr_col.Rd

Test if an Object is an fr_col

Usage

is.fr_col(x)

Arguments

x

An object to test.

Value

TRUE if x inherits from "fr_col", FALSE otherwise.

Examples

col <- fr_col(label = "Treatment", align = "center")
is.fr_col(col)       # TRUE
#> [1] TRUE
is.fr_col("text")    # FALSE
#> [1] FALSE
